docs.title: ARMxy Developer Center
docs.text:
Welcome to the official documentation center for ARMxy industrial edge gateways.

ARMxy is an industrial edge computing platform designed for industrial IoT applications, supporting multiple industrial protocols and edge applications.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Node-RED workflow development
  • Modbus RTU / TCP communication
  • MQTT cloud connectivity
  • OPC UA industrial data integration
  • CAN bus communication
  • Linux edge computing environment

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Learn how to configure and use ARMxy industrial gateways.

docs.title: Node-RED
docs.text: Tutorials for data acquisition, protocol conversion and IoT applications.

docs.title: Industrial Protocols
docs.text: Guides for Modbus, CAN, OPC UA and other industrial communication protocols.

docs.title: Applications
docs.text:
• Industrial IoT Gateway
  • Remote Device Monitoring
  • Edge Data Collection
  • Cloud Connectivity

docs.title: Introduction
docs.text:
Welcome to ARMxy Developer Center.

ARMxy is an industrial edge gateway platform for industrial IoT applications.

docs.title: Node-RED
docs.text: This section introduces Node-RED development on ARMxy industrial gateways.

docs.title: Modbus
docs.text: ARMxy supports Modbus RTU and Modbus TCP communication.
